name: hatyai-drone-rescue-web
description: Static web server for the Hatyai Drone Rescue prototype.

scripts.pages:deploy: npm run build:public && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name autokgapai --branch master
scripts.pages:deploy:drone: npm run build:drone && wrangler pages deploy dist-drone --project-name autokgapai-drone --branch master
scripts.pages:deploy:all: npm run pages:deploy && npm run pages:deploy:drone
